zh_CN: ▢71AE48玩法:保护你的床并摧毁敌人的床。收集铁锭、金锭，绿宝石和钻石来升级，使自身和队伍变得更强
en_US: ▢71AE48Gameplay: Protect your bed and destroys your enemies beds in the process. Gather iron ingots, gold ingots, emerald and diamonds to upgrade yourself in order to make you and your team stronger.
pt_PT: ▢71AE48GJogo: Proteja sua cama e destrua as camas de inimigos no processo. Reúna lingotes de ferro, lingotes de ouro, esmeralda e diamantes para se atualizar, a fim de fortalecer você e sua equipe.
pt_BR: ▢71AE48GJogo: Proteja sua cama e destrua as camas de inimigos no processo. Reúna lingotes de ferro, lingotes de ouro, esmeralda e diamantes para se atualizar, a fim de fortalecer você e sua equipe.
ru_RU: ▢71AE48Игровой процесс: Защитите свою и разрушайте вражеские кровати. Собирайте железные слитки, слитки, изумруды и бриллианты, чтобы модернизировать себя, чтобы сделать себя и свою команду сильнее.
ko_KR: ▢71AE48게임 플레이 :이 과정에서 침대를 보호하고 적의 침대를 파괴하십시오. 철 주괴, 금 주괴, 에메랄드 및 다이아몬드를 모아서 자신과 팀을 강하게 만드십시오.
de_DE: ▢71AE48Gameplay: Protégez votre lit et détruit les lits de vos ennemis dans le processus. Rassemblez des lingots de fer, des lingots d'or, d'émeraude et de diamants pour vous mettre à niveau afin de vous renforcer, vous et votre équipe.
fr_FR: ▢71AE48Gameplay: Protégez votre lit et détruit les lits de vos ennemis dans le processus. Rassemblez des lingots de fer, des lingots d'or, d'émeraude et de diamants pour vous mettre à niveau afin de vous renforcer, vous et votre équipe.
es_ES: ▢71AE48Gameplay: protege tu cama y destruye las camas de tus enemigos en el proceso. Reúne lingotes de hierro, lingotes de oro, esmeraldas y diamantes para mejorarte y fortalecerte a ti y a tu equipo.
it_IT: ▢71AE48Gameplay: proteggi il tuo letto e distrugge i letti dei nemici nel processo. Raccogli lingotti di ferro, lingotti d'oro, smeraldi e diamanti per migliorare te stesso e rafforzare te e la tua squadra.
in_ID: ▢71AE48Gameplay: Lindungi tempat tidur Anda dan hancurkan tempat tidur musuh Anda dalam proses. Kumpulkan besi batangan, batangan emas, zamrud dan berlian untuk meningkatkan diri Anda agar Anda dan tim Anda lebih kuat.
th_TH: ▢71AE48Gameplay: Protect your bed and destroys your enemies beds in the process. Gather iron ingots, gold ingots, emerald and diamonds to upgrade yourself in order to make you and your team stronger.
tr_TR: ▢71AE48Oyun: Yatağınızı koruyun ve bu süreçte düşman yataklarınızı yok edin. Sizi ve ekibinizi daha güçlü hale getirmek için demir külçeleri, altın külçeleri, zümrüt ve elmasları toplayın.
vi_VN: ▢71AE48Gameplay: Protect your bed and destroys your enemies beds in the process. Gather iron ingots, gold ingots, emerald and diamonds to upgrade yourself in order to make you and your team stronger.
ja_JP: ▢71AE48遊び方：ベッドを保護し、その過程で敵のベッドを壊します。鉄塊、金塊、エメラルド、ダイヤモンドを集めてアップグレードし、あなたとあなたのチームをより強くします。
